_comment: Curated kit for Azure architects. Companions are recommended-not-bundled. See docs/companions/ for per-server rationale.

azure-mcp._purpose: Official Microsoft Azure MCP. Source of truth for ARG, Quota, Advisor, Monitor, Policy, RBAC, AKS, AppService.

microsoft-learn._purpose: Grounded Microsoft Learn doc lookup. Reduces architect hallucination.

github._purpose: Repo, issue, PR access for IaC reviews and design intent diff.

mermaid._purpose: Render architecture diagrams inline in design reviews.

drawio._purpose: Visio-replacement diagrams, exportable for stakeholder decks.

kubernetes._purpose: Live cluster inspection during AKS design and ingress migration reviews.

terraform._purpose: HashiCorp Terraform registry lookup, plan, validate.

mcp-server-azure-architect._purpose: This repo. ALZ checklist queries by ID + scorecard composition. Read-only.
mcp-server-azure-architect._install: Replace command and args once the runtime ADR lands in docs/adr/runtime.md.
